provenance.name: Which lead or opportunity deserves attention?
What is the next best action?
Which segment or campaign should be prioritized?
CRM Lead capture and qualification API
CRM Customer value and health API
CRM Consent and communication history API

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: A person or organization is not duplicated when a verified matching rule identifies the same party.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Pipeline stages have ordered entry and exit criteria.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Opportunity probability is stage-derived unless an authorized override includes reason.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Activities retain actor, channel, time, outcome, and related party.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Marketing communication requires valid consent and suppression checks.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Customer lifetime value uses an approved Finance definition.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Churn recommendations expose factors and confidence.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Merged records preserve source lineage and audit history.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.
